name: Chatwoot Outbound Sender - De Paseo en Fincas

parameters.url: ={{ ("https://chat.depaseoenfincas.raaamp.co").replace(/\/$/, '') + '/api/v1/accounts/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_account_id || "1") + '/conversations/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_id) + '/messages' }}

parameters.name: content
parameters.value: ={{ $('Loop outbound items').item.json.send_caption === true ? String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.caption || '') : '' }}

assignments.name: chatwoot_message_id
assignments.value: ={{ Number(($('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.id) || ($('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.message?.id) || 0) }}

parameters.url: ={{ ("https://chat.depaseoenfincas.raaamp.co").replace(/\/$/, '') + '/api/v1/accounts/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_account_id || "1") + '/conversations/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_id) + '/messages' }}
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'No pude adjuntar uno de los assets de ' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.property_title || 'la finca') + ' en este momento. Te comparto el enlace:\n' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.source_url || $('Loop outbound items').item.json.download_url || ''), message_type: 'outgoing', private: $('Loop outbound items').item.json.private === true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ content: String($json.content || '').trim(), message_type: 'outgoing', private: $json.private === true }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO outbound_property_messages (
  chatwoot_message_id, chatwoot_conversation_id, finca_id, property_title, attachment_id, message_kind
)
SELECT
  $1::bigint,
  $2::bigint,
  $3::text,
  NULLIF($4::text, ''),
  CASE WHEN NULLIF($5::text, '') IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE $5::text::bigint END,
  $6::text
WHERE $1::bigint IS NOT NULL
  AND $1::bigint > 0
  AND $3::text IS NOT NULL
  AND length($3::text) > 0
ON CONFLICT (chatwoot_message_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING chatwoot_message_id, finca_id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ Number($('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.id || ($('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.message && $('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.message.id) || 0) }},={{ Number($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_id || 0) }},={{ String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.property_id || '') }},={{ String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.property_title || '') }},={{ ($('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.attachments && $('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.attachments[0] && $('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.attachments[0].id) ? String($('Upload media to Chatwoot').item.json.attachments[0].id) : '' }},={{ 'media' }}

WHERE $1::bigint IS NOT NULL
  AND $1::bigint > 0
  AND $3::text IS NOT NULL
  AND length($3::text) > 0
ON CONFLICT (chatwoot_message_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING chatwoot_message_id, finca_id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ Number($('Send Chatwoot text direct').item.json.id || ($('Send Chatwoot text direct').item.json.message && $('Send Chatwoot text direct').item.json.message.id) || 0) }},={{ Number($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_id || 0) }},={{ String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.property_id || '') }},={{ String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.property_title || '') }},={{ '' }},={{ 'card' }}
